title: Gravestone mod - Graves
description: This mod adds gravestones to the game that spawn when a player, villager, dog, cat, or horse dies and store all of their items.
body:
This mod adds gravestones to the game that spawn when a player, villager, dog, cat, or horse dies and store all of their items.

It also adds the Soulbound enchantment, which lets you keep your items after death, as well as 8 achievements.

If you'd like to craft a gravestone for decoration, you can use a special tool — the Chisel.
